title: adenia repanda
intro: Adenia repanda, also known as the "Ghanaian voodoo lily" or "African potato," is a plant species belonging to the Passifloraceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Adenia repanda include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. The plant is often used in traditional herbal preparations, such as decoctions, infusions, and topical creams, to harness its medicinal properties.
